title: Anneslea lanceolata

The Pentaphyllaceae family is an ancient and small family of flowering plants. Anneslea lanceolata is a type of shrub or small tree, which is not well-known globally. The classification of Anneslea lanceolata is within the kingdom Plantae.

intro: Anneslea lanceolata, also known as the lance-leaf anneslea, is a flowering plant species within the family Pentaphyllacaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, providing relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
